note: Six items are rows from the study's run, fetched by id from ../session-07/data/dataset.json at load (their texts are not copied here, so they cannot drift from the evidence). Two items are classic-form specimens I wrote myself, marked source:'authored' — the limitation says what that costs.

items.text: The piano tuner worked by ear alone, coaxing each string back to the note it had been made to hold.
The night nurse moved from bed to bed like a lamplighter, leaving each patient a little easier than she found them.
